title: Cinematic Winter Wildlife Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Winter Wildlife Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic winter portrait featuring adult woman with snow-dusted dark hair in a heavy fur-lined winter coat beside a calm gray wolf. Subject: adult woman with snow-dusted dark hair in a heavy fur-lined winter coat beside a calm gray wolf is the centered adult portrait and wildlife pairing, with intense calm eye contact, realistic skin or fur texture, symmetrical emotional presence, and quiet primal bond. Scene: snowy pine forest background, frost, soft falling snow and symmetrical watchful composition creates the frozen forest or winter wilderness atmosphere with snowfall, frost, mist, soft background blur, and watchful cinematic stillness. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: Snow-dusted hair, heavy winter coat, calm watchful animal companion, golden or luminous eyes, falling snow, cold mist, symmetrical eye focus, and quiet cinematic bond. Style: Fine-art wildlife and cinematic portrait photography, ultra-realistic detail, quiet intensity, mystery, reverence for nature, photorealistic skin and fur, premium winter editorial finish, and 8K-level clarity. Color Palette: Cool winter blues, snow whites, frost grays, dark hair or coat contrast, subtle warmth in skin and eyes, golden animal-eye accents, and misty forest neutrals. Lighting: Soft natural overcast winter light with diffused shadows, gentle eye catchlights, frost sparkle, cool cinematic tones, and subtle warmth in skin and animal eyes. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
